title: ProjectSpec
description: L2 — A project artifact (requirement, design, or ADR) that claims to address one or more L1 domain concepts. `specType` is the requirement/design/ADR axis, kept distinct from the base-entry `type` discriminator. Links to the concepts it addresses are modelled as `specifies` relationships.

status.description: Lifecycle of the spec itself (e.g. draft/approved/superseded).

addressedConcepts.description: Ids of the L1 domain concepts this spec addresses; mirrored as specifies edges.
